text:
:rotating_light: *P1 Incident INC0048821* :rotating_light:
*Title:* Bulk invoice CSV upload fails with 500 error for enterprise customers
*Service:* payment-service (production)
*Status:* Triggered
*Assigned:* @alex.chen (on-call)
*SLA:* Breaching in 4h
https://acmepay.pagerduty.com/incidents/INC0048821
actionItemText: Acknowledge and investigate P1 incident INC0048821

text: Acknowledged. Investigating now. Looks like the CSV parser is OOM on large files.

:chart_with_upwards_trend: *Auth Service Latency Alert*
P95 latency now at 12.3s (threshold: 2s)
Service: auth-service
Time: 2024-01-14 22:15 UTC
@channel please investigate
Looking at this now. DB CPU at 98%. Checking for runaway queries. @alex.chen any chance you have a cron job hitting auth around 10pm?
Not that I know of. Let me check the cron config. Could be the batch invoice processing job.

:wave: Morning team! Quick reminders before standup at 10:
- Sprint board updates please — need accurate status on all stories
- @alex.chen can you also add your bulk upload ticket estimates? Need them for capacity planning
- @priya.sharma the CI failure on your timezone PR needs attention
- @jordan.lee how's the RBAC schema coming along?
See you in 2 hours!
actionItemText: Add bulk upload ticket estimates to sprint board before standup

text: Morning! CI failure is from the timezone test — I need to rebase off main. Will have it fixed before standup. :sweat_smile:
RBAC schema design is done, waiting on Alex's Confluence doc to make sure we align. Also — @alex.chen any chance you looked at PR #892 yet? No rush but would love to get it merged today :pray:
actionItemText: Review PR #892 for auth token refresh

text: Morning. Dashboard perf fix is ready but blocked on Alex's query layer changes. @alex.chen let's sync after standup on merge order?

Morning all! Yeah let's sync after standup. Jordan — I saw your PR on Friday, left a comment about tryLock. Will finalize review before standup. Marcus — query refactor is done, we can plan the merge order today.
Sprint board updated with estimates. Bulk upload is at 8 SP total, down from 13 since I've completed the parsing piece. P1 bug is 5 SP. Will update again after standup.
Great, thanks Alex! :tada:
PR #892 reviewed and approved. Nice work @jordan.lee! The tryLock suggestion works well. :rocket:

Heads up — found a great library for Node.js stream processing: `pipeline-streams` v2.0 just dropped. It simplifies backpressure handling for CSV/JSON streams. Might be useful for the payment service upload stuff @alex.chen and @jordan.lee are working on. :link: https://github.com/example/pipeline-streams

:x: *Build Failed* — payment-service/main #4781
Commit: 7a3f9b2 (Priya Sharma — timezone fix)
Stage: integration-tests
:github: https://github.com/acmepay/payment-service/actions/runs/4781

:white_check_mark: *Staging deploy complete* — payment-service v2.4.1-rc3
Image: acmepay/payment-service:2.4.1-rc3
Deployed to: staging-us-west-2
Smoke tests: 12/12 passing
Morning! Did you get a chance to look at PR #892? Standup is at 10, would be great to have it approved :pray:
Just reviewed and approved! Great work :rocket: The tryLock with timeout is exactly what we needed.
:tada: Awesome, thanks! Merging now. Also — any ETA on that Confluence doc for the RBAC schema? Priya and I are both waiting on it.
Hey Alex, saw the P1 alert — are you on this? Let me know if you need help escalating internally or with the customer.
Hi Sarah — yes, acknowledged it last night. Root cause is the synchronous CSV parser. I'm switching to a streaming approach. Will have a fix by Monday EOD at the latest. I'll keep you posted.

Alex — quick reminder, please update the sprint board with your estimates before standup. Also, the 3-slide RCA for Tuesday — Sarah mentioned in Friday's meeting. Let me know if you need any template help.
